member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmError
member.summary: Error codes returned by the WebRTC Audio Processing Module

member.summary: Noise suppression levels

member.summary: Gain controller modes

member.summary: Runtime setting types

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.StreamConfig
member.summary: Represents a stream configuration for audio processing

member.summary: Creates a new stream configuration

member.summary: Sample rate in Hz

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.StreamConfig.NumChannels
member.summary: Number of channels

member.summary: Disposes managed and unmanaged resources

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ProcessingConfig
member.summary: Represents a processing configuration for audio processing

member.summary: Creates a new processing configuration

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ProcessingConfig.InputStream
member.summary: Input stream configuration

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ProcessingConfig.OutputStream
member.summary: Output stream configuration

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ProcessingConfig.ReverseInputStream
member.summary: Reverse input stream configuration

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ProcessingConfig.ReverseOutputStream
member.summary: Reverse output stream configuration

member.summary: Disposes managed and unmanaged resources

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmConfig
member.summary: Represents an APM configuration

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmConfig.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new APM configuration

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmConfig.SetEchoCanceller(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures the echo canceller

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmConfig.SetNoiseSuppression(System.Boolean,SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.NoiseSuppressionLevel)
member.summary: Configures noise suppression

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmConfig.SetGainController1(System.Boolean,SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.GainControlMode,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures gain controller 1

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmConfig.SetGainController2(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures gain controller 2

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmConfig.SetHighPassFilter(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures the high pass filter
member.param: Whether the high pass filter is enabled

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmConfig.SetPreAmplifier(System.Boolean,System.Single)
member.summary: Configures the pre-amplifier

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmConfig.SetPipeline(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.DownmixMethod)
member.summary: Configures the processing pipeline

member.summary: Disposes managed and unmanaged resources

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule
member.summary: Provides access to the WebRTC Audio Processing Module

member.name: F:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.NativePtr
member.summary: The native APM instance

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new Audio Processing Module instance

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.ApplyConfig(SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.ApmConfig)
member.summary: Applies configuration to the APM

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the APM with default settings

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.ProcessStream(System.Single[][],SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.StreamConfig,SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.StreamConfig,System.Single[][])
member.summary: Processes a stream of audio data

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.ProcessReverseStream(System.Single[][],SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.StreamConfig,SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.StreamConfig,System.Single[][])
member.summary: Processes a reverse stream of audio data

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.AnalyzeReverseStream(System.Single[][],SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.StreamConfig)
member.summary: Analyzes a reverse stream of audio data
member.param: Audio data to analyze (array of channels)

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.SetStreamAnalogLevel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the analog level for the current stream

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.GetRecommendedStreamAnalogLevel
member.summary: Gets the recommended analog level for the current stream

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.SetStreamDelayMs(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the delay in ms between ProcessReverseStream() and ProcessStream()

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.GetStreamDelayMs
member.summary: Gets the current stream delay

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.SetRuntimeSetting(SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.RuntimeSettingType,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets a runtime setting with a float value

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.SetRuntimeSetting(SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.RuntimeSettingType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets a runtime setting with an integer value

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.GetProcSampleRateHz
member.summary: Gets the current processing sample rate

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.GetProcSplitSampleRateHz
member.summary: Gets the current processing split sample rate

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.GetNumInputChannels
member.summary: Gets the number of input channels

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.GetNumProcChannels
member.summary: Gets the number of processing channels

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.GetNumOutputChannels
member.summary: Gets the number of output channels

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.GetNumReverseChannels
member.summary: Gets the number of reverse channels

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.AudioProcessingModule.GetFrameSize(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the frame size for a given sample rate

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.NativeMethods
member.summary: Native methods

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.NativeMethods.NativeLibraryResolver.GetPlatformSpecificLibraryName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the platform-specific library name.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.NativeMethods.NativeLibraryResolver.GetLibraryPath(System.String)
member.summary: Constructs the relative path to the native library within the 'runtimes' folder.

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Components.ProcessedAudioChunkHandler
member.summary: Delegate for handling processed audio chunks.
member.param: A ReadOnlyMemory of float representing the processed audio chunk.

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Components.NoiseSuppressor
member.summary: Processes audio from an ISoundDataProvider using WebRTC Noise Suppression and provides the cleaned audio either as a complete raw float array or chunk by chunk via an event. This component is designed for offline/batch processing.

member.name: E:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Components.NoiseSuppressor.OnAudioChunkProcessed
member.summary: Event raised when a chunk of audio has been processed.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Components.NoiseSuppressor.#ctor(SoundFlow.Interfaces.ISoundDataProvider,SoundFlow.Structs.AudioFormat,SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.NoiseSuppressionLevel,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The audio data provider to process.
The format of the audio from the dataProvider. SampleRate must be 8k, 16k, 32k, or 48k Hz. Format must be F32.
The desired level of noise suppression.
If true and audioFormat.Channels > 1, attempts to process channels independently. If false, channels may be downmixed by APM.
member.exception: Thrown if audioFormat is invalid or unsupported by WebRTC APM.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Components.NoiseSuppressor.ProcessAll
member.summary: Processes the entire audio stream from the provided data provider and returns the noise-suppressed audio as a single float array. This method is suitable for smaller audio files that can fit in memory.
member.returns: A float array containing the processed (noise-suppressed) audio data.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Components.NoiseSuppressor.ProcessChunks(System.Action{System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Single}})
member.summary: Processes the audio stream from the data provider in chunks. For each processed chunk, the event is raised. This method is suitable for processing large audio files without loading them entirely into memory.
member.param: An optional action to handle processed chunks directly, in addition to the event.
member.exception: Thrown if the NoiseSuppressor has been disposed.
Thrown if the processing failed or if the APM configuration is invalid.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Components.NoiseSuppressor.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes this NoiseSuppressor instance.

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier
member.summary: A SoundModifier that applies WebRTC Audio Processing Module (APM) features such as Echo Cancellation, Noise Suppression, and Automatic Gain Control to the audio stream.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the audio modifier.

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.EchoCancellationSettings
member.summary: Settings for the Echo Cancellation feature.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.EchoCancellationSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Echo Cancellation is enabled.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.EchoCancellationSettings.MobileMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether mobile mode is enabled for Echo Cancellation. Mobile mode often tolerates higher latency but might be less aggressive.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.EchoCancellationSettings.LatencyMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the estimated audio processing latency in milliseconds. Used by AEC to align near-end and far-end signals. Must be non-negative.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.EchoCancellationSettings.#ctor(SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.NoiseSuppressionSettings
member.summary: Settings for the Noise Suppression feature.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.NoiseSuppressionSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Noise Suppression is enabled.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.NoiseSuppressionSettings.Level
member.summary: Gets or sets the level of noise suppression to apply.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.NoiseSuppressionSettings.#ctor(SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier,System.Boolean,SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.NoiseSuppressionLevel)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.AutomaticGainControlSettings
member.summary: Settings for the Automatic Gain Control feature. Note: WebRTC has two AGC implementations (AGC1 and AGC2). AGC2 is newer. Settings like Mode, TargetLevelDbfs, etc., primarily apply to AGC1.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.AutomaticGainControlSettings.Agc1Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether AGC1 (legacy) is enabled.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.AutomaticGainControlSettings.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the AGC mode (primarily affects AGC1).

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.AutomaticGainControlSettings.TargetLevelDbfs
member.summary: Gets or sets the target output level in dBFS for Adaptive Digital AGC (AGC1). Clamped between -31 and 0.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.AutomaticGainControlSettings.CompressionGainDb
member.summary: Gets or sets the compression gain in dB for Fixed Digital AGC (AGC1). Clamped between 0 and 90.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.AutomaticGainControlSettings.LimiterEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the AGC limiter is enabled (AGC1).

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.AutomaticGainControlSettings.Agc2Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether AGC2 (newer) is enabled. Note: AGC1 and AGC2 can potentially run simultaneously, but might be mutually exclusive depending on WebRTC version/config. Check WebRTC documentation for behavior when both are enabled.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.AutomaticGainControlSettings.#ctor(SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier,System.Boolean,SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.GainControlMode,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.ProcessingPipelineSettings
member.summary: Settings for configuring the processing pipeline within WebRTC APM, specifically how multichannel audio is handled and downmixed.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.ProcessingPipelineSettings.UseMultichannelCapture
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether multichannel processing is enabled for the capture (near-end) stream. If false, input channels might be downmixed before processing.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.ProcessingPipelineSettings.UseMultichannelRender
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether multichannel processing is enabled for the render (far-end) stream. If false, input channels might be downmixed before processing.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.ProcessingPipelineSettings.DownmixMethod
member.summary: Gets or sets the method used for downmixing channels if multichannel processing is disabled for a stream.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.ProcessingPipelineSettings.#ctor(SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.DownmixMethod)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.EchoCancellation
member.summary: Gets the settings object for Echo Cancellation.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.NoiseSuppression
member.summary: Gets the settings object for Noise Suppression.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.AutomaticGainControl
member.summary: Gets the settings object for Automatic Gain Control.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.ProcessingPipeline
member.summary: Gets the settings object for configuring the processing pipeline (multichannel, downmixing).

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.HighPassFilterEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the High Pass Filter is enabled. This filter removes frequencies below 80 Hz.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.PreAmplifierEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Pre-Amplifier is enabled. Applies a gain factor before other processing steps.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.PreAmplifierGainFactor
member.summary: Gets or sets the gain factor applied by the Pre-Amplifier. Only active if is true.

member.name: P:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.PostProcessGain
member.summary: Gets or sets a post-processing gain factor applied after WebRTC APM processing.
Initializes a new instance of the class with specified settings.
member.param: The capture device to source audio from.
Initial state for Echo Cancellation Enabled.
Initial state for Echo Cancellation Mobile Mode.
Initial state for Echo Cancellation Latency in ms.
Initial state for Noise Suppression Enabled.
Initial state for Noise Suppression Level.
Initial state for AGC Mode (primarily AGC1).
Initial state for AGC Target Level dBFS (AGC1 Adaptive Digital).
Initial state for AGC Compression Gain dB (AGC1 Fixed Digital).
Initial state for AGC Limiter Enabled (AGC1).
Initial state for High Pass Filter Enabled.
Initial state for Pre-Amplifier Gain Factor.
member.exception: Thrown if the audio sample rate is not supported by WebRTC APM (8000, 16000, 32000, or 48000 Hz).

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.Process(System.Span{System.Single},System.Int32)
member.summary: Processes the given audio buffer (near-end stream) using the WebRTC APM. Input samples are queued and processed in frames corresponding to the APM's internal frame size. Output samples are dequeued and written back to the buffer.
member.param: The audio buffer to process (interleaved float samples).
The number of channels in the audio buffer.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.ProcessSample(System.Single,System.Int32)
member.summary: This method is not supported by the WebRtcApmModifier as it processes audio in frames, not sample-by-sample.
member.param: The channel index of the sample.
member.returns: The processed sample (this method always throws).

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.param: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizer for the .

member.name: M:SoundFlow.Extensions.WebRtc.Apm.Modifiers.WebRtcApmModifier.Dispose
member.summary: Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.
